messages.content: Create 5 questions similar to this question, for a 5th grader to solve.   75.3 divided by 8.6

1) If you have 75.3 candy bars and you want to share them equally among 8.6 friends, how many candy bars would each friend get?
2) A book has 75.3 pages and you want to divide it equally among 8.6 people for a reading assignment. How many pages will each person read?
3) You have 75.3 stickers and want to divide them equally among 8.6 classmates. How many stickers will each classmate receive?
4) If you have 75.3 dollars and you want to split it equally among 8.6 friends, how much money will each friend get?
5) You have 75.3 minutes of free time and want to distribute it equally among 8.6 activities. How many minutes will each activity get?

provide the answers to the following questions                                                                                                                                                 1) If you have 75.3 candy bars and you want to share them equally among 8.6 friends, how many candy bars would each friend get?
2) A book has 75.3 pages and you want to divide it equally among 8.6 people for a reading assignment. How many pages will each person read?
3) You have 75.3 stickers and want to divide them equally among 8.6 classmates. How many stickers will each classmate receive?
4) If you have 75.3 dollars and you want to split it equally among 8.6 friends, how much money will each friend get?
5) You have 75.3 minutes of free time and want to distribute it equally among 8.6 activities. How many minutes will each activity get?

1) If you have 75.3 candy bars and you want to share them equally among 8.6 friends, each friend would get 8.75 candy bars.
2) A book has 75.3 pages and you want to divide it equally among 8.6 people for a reading assignment. Each person will read approximately 8.75 pages.
3) You have 75.3 stickers and want to divide them equally among 8.6 classmates. Each classmate will receive approximately 8.75 stickers.
4) If you have 75.3 dollars and you want to split it equally among 8.6 friends, each friend will get approximately 8.77 dollars.
5) You have 75.3 minutes of free time and want to distribute it equally among 8.6 activities. Each activity will get approximately 8.76 minutes.
create 5 math problems asking students to divide a multi digit whole number with decimals by a single digit number with decimals.  Provide the answer to each qeustion.

1) Divide 32.4 by 4. What is the quotient? Answer: 8.1
2) Divide 125.6 by 2. What is the quotient? Answer: 62.8
3) Divide 81.9 by 9. What is the quotient? Answer: 9.1
4) Divide 197.5 by 5. What is the quotient? Answer: 39.5
5) Divide 58.3 by 7. What is the quotient? Answer: 8.32857 (rounded to 5 decimal places)
create 5 math problems asking students to multiply a multi digit whole number with decimals with a double digit number with decimals.  Provide the answer to each question

1) Multiply 4.5 by 23. What is the product? Answer: 103.5
2) Multiply 18.7 by 32. What is the product? Answer: 598.4
3) Multiply 7.9 by 45. What is the product? Answer: 355.5
4) Multiply 65.2 by 87. What is the product? Answer: 5,675.4
5) Multiply 21.3 by 56. What is the product? Answer: 1,192.8
create 5 math problems asking students to subtract multi digit whole number with decimals from another multi digit number with decimals. Provide the answer to each question

1) Subtract 64.2 from 125. What is the difference? Answer: 60.8
2) Subtract 12.7 from 24.9. What is the difference? Answer: 12.2
3) Subtract 39.6 from 86.4. What is the difference? Answer: 46.8
4) Subtract 7.3 from 18.5. What is the difference? Answer: 11.2
5) Subtract 98.7 from 123.4. What is the difference? Answer: 24.7
create 5 math problems asking students to add multi digit whole numbers with decimals with another multi digit numbers with decimals.  provide the answer to each question

1) Add 12.5 to 3.7. What is the sum? Answer: 16.2
2) Add 8.9 to 17.6. What is the sum? Answer: 26.5
3) Add 4.3 to 9.8. What is the sum? Answer: 14.1
4) Add 26.7 to 15.2. What is the sum? Answer: 41.9
5) Add 32.1 to 7.6. What is the sum? Answer: 39.7
create 5 math problems asking students to add multi digit whole numbers to the hundreds with decimals with another multi digit numbers with decimals. provide the answer to each question

1) Add 428.6 to 100. What is the sum? Answer: 528.6
2) Add 749.3 to 200. What is the sum? Answer: 949.3
3) Add 625.1 to 300. What is the sum? Answer: 925.1
4) Add 856.7 to 400. What is the sum? Answer: 1,256.7
5) Add 938.4 to 500. What is the sum? Answer: 1,438.4
create 2 math problems asking students to multiply a multi digit whole number with decimals with a double digit number with decimals. Provide the answer to each question

1) Multiply 12.3 by 34. What is the product? Answer: 418.2
2) Multiply 45.6 by 87. What is the product? Answer: 3,979.2
create 3math problems asking students to subtract multi digit whole number with decimals from another multi digit number with decimals. Provide the answer to each question

1) Subtract 14.5 from 36.7. What is the difference? Answer: 22.2
2) Subtract 72.9 from 98.4. What is the difference? Answer: 25.5
3) Subtract 6.3 from 17.8. What is the difference? Answer: 11.5
create 3 math problems asking students to multiply a multi digit whole number with decimals with a double digit number with decimals. Provide the answer to each question

1) Multiply 3.5 by 15. What is the product? Answer: 52.5
2) Multiply 7.2 by 29. What is the product? Answer: 208.8
3) Multiply 4.8 by 12. What is the product? Answer: 57.6
create 3 math problems asking students to divide a multi digit whole number with decimals by a single digit number with decimals. Provide the answer to each question.

1) Divide 67.2 by 3. What is the quotient? Answer: 22.4
2) Divide 123.6 by 6. What is the quotient? Answer: 20.6
3) Divide 89.1 by 9. What is the quotient? Answer: 9.9
create 2 math problems asking students to add multi digit whole numbers to the hundreds with decimals with another multi digit numbers with decimals. provide the answer to each question

1) Add 426.8 to 1000. What is the sum? Answer: 1,426.8
2) Add 739.5 to 5000. What is the sum? Answer: 5,739.5
